# Bill Fanter

> Bill Fanter teaches options trading. The site offers a 6-session Options Trading Masterclass, a daily trading community, a free weekly stock watchlist, and a free options webinar.

Bill Fanter spent 35 years in banking and the markets. He now trades options around the market open and teaches a proven system: he shows you how to spot setups, size risk, and place trades you understand. Options Action LLC runs the site from Las Vegas, Nevada.

All content is educational. Trading options carries real risk, results vary, and nothing here is financial advice.

## Start here

- [Home](https://www.billfanter.com): what Bill offers and how to begin.
- [About Bill Fanter](https://www.billfanter.com/about): Bill's background and how he teaches.
- [Options Trading Masterclass](https://www.billfanter.com/masterclass): 6 live sessions covering options basics, reading charts, building a trading plan, and risk management. Includes the trading community and lifetime access to the recordings.
- [Community](https://www.billfanter.com/community): daily live trade alerts, market analysis, and direct access to Bill.

## Free resources

- [Free options webinar](https://www.billfanter.com/webinar): learn how Bill trades the opening hour with a rules-based plan.
- [Free weekly watchlist](https://www.billfanter.com/free-watchlist): stock and ETF setups with price levels, sent every Sunday.
- [Student reviews](https://www.billfanter.com/student-comments): reviews from Masterclass and community members.
- [Blog](https://www.billfanter.com/blog): articles and trade breakdowns.

## Contact

- Email: options@billfanter.com
- [Contact page](https://www.billfanter.com/contact)
